pages.text: An amulet whose nature has not yet been witnessed.$(br2)Using it reveals one of its enigmatic variants.
pages.title: Unwitnessed Amulet

pages.text: Each revealed amulet has a different color and power:$(br2)$(li)Red: Attack Damage$(br)$(li)Aqua: Sprint Speed$(br)$(li)Violet: Projectile Deflection$(br)$(li)Magenta: Gravity Change$(br)$(li)Green: Mining Efficiency$(br)$(li)Black: Lifesteal$(br)$(li)Blue: Swim Speed
pages.title: Revealed Forms
